nasb.text: how he met you along the way and attacked among you all the stragglers at your rear when you were faint and weary; and he did not fear God.

esv.text: how he attacked you on the way when you were faint and weary, and cut off your tail, those who were lagging behind you, and he did not fear God.

cnv.text: 怎樣在路上遇見了你，趁你疲倦困乏的時候，攻擊你後方所有軟弱無力的人，並不敬畏　神。

ccb.text: 他们趁你们疲惫不堪时，袭击你们当中掉队的人，毫不敬畏上帝。
